mapper.select: SELECT * FROM attendance_correction_requests WHERE request_id = #{requestId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM attendance_correction_requests WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY attendance_date DESC, request_id DESC
SELECT * FROM attendance_correction_requests WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY submitted_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_correction_requests ( user_id, attendance_date, target_year_month, requested_start_time, requested_end_time, requested_break_time_minutes, requested_night_shift_hours, requested_remarks, reason, current_start_time, current_end_time, current_break_time_minutes, current_night_shift_hours, current_remarks, status, submitted_at, action_by, action_comment, action_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{attendanceDate, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalDateTypeHandler}, #{targetYearMonth}, #{requestedStartTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{requestedEndTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{requestedBreakTimeMinutes}, #{requestedNightShiftHours}, #{requestedRemarks}, #{reason}, #{currentStartTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{currentEndTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{currentBreakTimeMinutes}, #{currentNightShiftHours}, #{currentRemarks}, #{status}, #{submittedAt}, #{actionBy}, #{actionComment}, #{actionAt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_correction_requests SET status = #{status}, action_by = #{actionBy}, action_comment = #{actionComment}, action_at = #{actionAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE request_id = #{requestId}
